forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
High
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog on the eastern slopes. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Cloudy. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly during the morning then tending east to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late morning and early afternoon. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
High
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the morning then tending east to northeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely during the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning then turning southerly in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Cloudy. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending east to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely late this afternoon and evening with possible small hail in the south. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning then turning southerly in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
High
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening then becoming south to southwesterly and light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely this morning. The chance of a thunderstorm early this morning. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Mostly sunny. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Becoming cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the southwest, medium chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny day. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely this morning. The chance of a thunderstorm early this morning. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 21.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late morning and early afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm this morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 20 to 25.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower east of Ceduna early this morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely this morning. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending easterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending east to northeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera this morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 25 to 34.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]
Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 33.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers east of Leigh Creek during the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm during the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 23 to 37.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 25.
Sunny. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
